title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. leucolepis
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. leucolepis, also known as the Leucanthemum leucolepis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as the Ox-eye Daisy. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. leucolepis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. leucolepis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
